description: Create a dense-fog radar navigation assessment scenario in Bridge Command named 'r) Solent Fog Radar Assessment'. The scenario files (environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini) must be located at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/r) Solent Fog Radar Assessment/. Configure the environment for the 'Solent' setting on 15/11/2024 at 10:00, with a visibility range of 0.3, calm weather (1.0), and no visible rain. Set the ownship 'MV Sentinel' at 50.7900°N, 1.1500°W on a bearing of 225 at 8.0 knots. The othership.ini must include five traffic vessels (Baltic Merchant, Solent Ferry, FV Harvest Moon, Tanker Oceanus, and Yacht Artemis) within the bounds of Lat 50.70-50.85 and Long -1.30 to -1.05, each having at least two waypoint legs. Update bc5.ini radar settings to include arpa_on=1, full_radar=1, radar_range_resolution=512, max_radar_range=48, radar_angular_resolution=1440, and hide_instruments=0. Additionally, generate a student assessment worksheet at /home/ga/Documents/fog_assessment_worksheet.txt covering COLREGS Rules 19, 5, 6, fog signals, and avoidance questions for the five vessels. Provide a corresponding instructor answer key at /home/ga/Documents/fog_assessment_answers.txt referencing Rule 19(d), Rule 19(e), and safe speed factors.
